description: Russian state broadcaster funded by the Kremlin and operating internationally in English, Arabic, Spanish, and other languages. RT regularly platforms Iranian regime-aligned commentators such as [Mohammad Marandi](/people/mohammad-marandi) as purportedly independent analysts, amplifying narratives favorable to both Moscow and Tehran. The outlet has been designated a foreign agent in multiple Western jurisdictions.
editorial_notes: RT is a well-documented Kremlin propaganda vehicle. Its use as a platform by Marandi and others should be treated as evidence of regime alignment rather than neutral media activity.
